description.name: PeakRack EPay (易支付)
description.tagline: Accept CNY payments through EPay-compatible V1 MD5 and V2 RSA hosted payment.
description.long: A WHMCS payment gateway for EPay-compatible hosted payment providers. It supports V1 MD5 request signing, V2 RSA compatible signing, signed payment callbacks, optional cashier routing, and WHMCS currency conversion to CNY. Public example provider: 互六鼎付 at https://pay.idcli.com/.
features: Customer-facing payment method chooser for Alipay, WeChat Pay, QQ Wallet, bank, cashier, and custom provider types
Copy-paste friendly Submit URL handling with optional trailing slash
V1 MD5 request and callback signature verification
V2 RSA compatible signing with timestamp and platform-public-key callback verification
Risk-style admin language buttons for Chinese and English gateway configuration labels
CNY amount verification for converted WHMCS invoices
